items.markdown:
Workflow automation is `the use of software to perform repetitive tasks automatically, relying on preset rules to route data, files, or tasks between people and systems` . It replaces manual labor with "if-then" logic, allowing one action to trigger the next without human intervention.[](https://mailchimp.com/resources/what-is-workflow-automation/) [[1]](https://mailchimp.com/resources/what-is-workflow-automation/)[[2]](https://www.outsystems.com/automation/workflow-automation-guide/)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZhewcLWb5xs&t=6)

How It Works

Automated workflows operate continuously and on their own. They are typically broken down into two main components:[](https://webcon.com/blog/what-is-workflow-automation/) [[1]](https://webcon.com/blog/what-is-workflow-automation/)

- **The Trigger:** The starting event (e.g., a customer fills out a contact form or a new lead is assigned).
- **The Action:** The automated result (e.g., the software instantly sends a welcome email, updates a CRM, and notifies your sales team).[[1]](https://www.outsystems.com/automation/workflow-automation-guide/)[[2]](https://webcon.com/blog/what-is-workflow-automation/)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=udvybQN8Bzo)

Real-World Examples

Businesses use workflow automation across almost every department to save time and eliminate tedious manual entry. Common examples include:[](https://www.salesforce.com/mulesoft/workflow-automation/) [[1]](https://www.salesforce.com/mulesoft/workflow-automation/)

- **Human Resources:** When a new hire signs an offer letter, the system automatically creates their IT account, sends them an onboarding checklist, and alerts the payroll department.[](https://www.automationanywhere.com/rpa/workflow-automation) [[1]](https://www.automationanywhere.com/rpa/workflow-automation)[[2]](https://www.hrcloud.com/resources/glossary/hr-workflow-automation)[[3]](https://www.salesforce.com/ap/service/hr-service-management/hr-automation/)[[4]](https://equitysofttechnologies.com/blogs/workflow-automation-vs-ai-agents/)[[5]](https://www.thinkautomation.com/document-automation)
- **Sales & Marketing:** When a user abandons their shopping cart, the system automatically triggers a personalized discount email to entice them to finish the transaction.[](https://mailchimp.com/resources/what-is-workflow-automation/) [[1]](https://mailchimp.com/resources/what-is-workflow-automation/)
- **Project Management:** When a project task is marked as "complete," the system automatically notifies the next person in line, moves the task to the next stage, and updates the project timeline.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=udvybQN8Bzo) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=udvybQN8Bzo)

Key Benefits By automating monotonous steps, organizations free up employees to focus on high-impact, strategic work. Core benefits include:[](https://www.salesforce.com/mulesoft/workflow-automation/) [[1]](https://www.salesforce.com/mulesoft/workflow-automation/)

- **Increased Efficiency:** Processes move much faster without waiting for human intervention.
- **Fewer Errors:** Preset rules eliminate typos and mistakes caused by fatigue.
- **Standardization:** Tasks are always completed in the exact same sequence and timeframe.[](https://www.outsystems.com/automation/workflow-automation-guide/) [[1]](https://www.outsystems.com/automation/workflow-automation-guide/)[[2]](https://www.salesforce.com/mulesoft/workflow-automation/)[[3]](https://www.walkme.com/blog/workflow-automation/)[[4]](https://mdaudit.com/blog/top-5-ways-audit-workflow-automation-improves-compliance-efficiency/)

Popular Tools You don't need to be a programmer to automate workflows. Many teams use low-code/no-code, drag-and-drop platforms like Zapier, Make , or n8n to instantly connect their existing applications.[](https://www.vellum.ai/blog/top-low-code-ai-workflow-automation-tools) [[1]](https://www.vellum.ai/blog/top-low-code-ai-workflow-automation-tools)[[2]](https://webcon.com/blog/what-is-workflow-automation/)For a quick 3-minute visual breakdown of how a trigger and action connect in a real-world automated workflow:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn2.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTrlPoUj3iNDbY1KxMoeATaUPHmhKlUT-j1fvYNh7FlU3HG_8xC)

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041501-1876-0139-0000-9bb3f44f731f:5)

expanded_element.title: Workflow Automation 101: Examples, Tools & Implementation Steps
expanded_element.description:
Examples of workflow automation
 Manufacturing: Supply chain management, inventory control, quality control processes, equipment maintenance scheduling, production scheduling. Retail: Customer service via chatbots, order processing, inventory updates, pricing adjustments, loyalty program management.
